item.title: Medline Industries, LP: Medline medical convenience kit labeled as EYE TRAY-LF, Medline Kit SKU DYNJ21627P Recall
item.product: Medline medical convenience kit labeled as EYE TRAY-LF, Medline Kit SKU DYNJ21627P
item.summary: Specific Medline Kits contain Cardinal Health Monoject 1mL Luer Lock Syringes, Tuberculin Print, Sterile. Cardinal Health has recalled these syringes because the outer carton and blister pack are labeled as a 1 mL Luer Lock Tuberculin Syringe (Product Code 1180100777), but the syringes inside are U-100 insulin syringes. Product details: Medline medical convenience kit labeled as EYE TRAY-LF, Medline Kit SKU DYNJ21627P
item.affectedPeople: US Nationwide distribution in the states of California.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
